basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Tutor/ Clinical Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani)
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) has officially announced the Tutor/ Clinical Instructor Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official website https://aiimskalyani.edu.in/. Candidates who meet the maximum age limit of 50 years and hold a B.Sc. Nursing degree from a recognized institution/ university or are Registered Nurse & Midwife with a Sister Tutors Diploma, along with the prescribed teaching experience, can now submit their online applications up to 24 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notif

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, Government Servant: 5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Nursing Degree from a recognized Institution/University OR Registered Nurse and Midwife with sister Tutors Diploma
qualification.details: B.Sc. Nursing Degree from a recognized Institution/University OR Registered Nurse and Midwife with sister Tutors Diploma. Registered Nurse Midwife. Three years' experience in a teaching Institution.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Kalyani Tutor/Clinical Instructor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Kalyani Tutor/Clinical Instructor Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Tutor/Clinical Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Kalyani Tutor/Clinical Instructor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Kalyani Tutor/Clinical Instructor positions is 24th July 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Tutor/Clinical Instructor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. Nursing Degree from a recognized institution or university. Alternatively, a Registered Nurse and Midwife with a Sister Tutors Diploma is also accepted. Additionally, three years of experience in a teaching institution is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Tutor/Clinical Instructor post is 50 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST, OBC, PwBD, and Government Servant categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Tutor/Clinical Instructor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be appointed at Level-10 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) guidelines, which offers a competitive salary package.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Tutor/Clinical Instructor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Tutor/Clinical Instructor position in the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kalyani.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Tutor/Clinical Instructor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 3540/-. However, Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Kalyani Tutor/Clinical Instructor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an OMR-based Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the final selection.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any relaxation in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for reserved categories. SC/ST candidates get a 5-year relaxation, OBC candidates get a 3-year relaxation, and PwBD candidates receive a 10-year relaxation. Government servants also get a 5-year relaxation.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the AIIMS Kalyani Tutor/Clinical Instructor job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of AIIMS Kalyani on or before the last date. Ensure all details are filled correctly and required documents are uploaded.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment drive.
